name: collapsible
description: Expandable section with controlled and uncontrolled modes, LayoutAnimation, and custom icon support.

props.name: title
props.description: Header text displayed in the pressable toggle row.

props.name: children
props.description: Content revealed when the collapsible is expanded.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Initial open state for uncontrolled usage.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state; when provided the component is fully controlled.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Callback fired when the header is pressed, receives the new open state.

props.name: icon
props.description: Custom element to replace the default chevron icon in the header.

props.name: testID
props.description: Test identifier forwarded to the header Pressable.
